Reasoning: The current visit record does not contain any explicit evidence of a primary lipid disorder, such as hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia, as a diagnosis or an actively managed condition. While the patient has multiple complex health issues, none of the listed diagnoses or prescribed medications explicitly point to an existing or actively managed lipid disorder that would necessitate coding "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" in the next visit, according to the strict criteria provided.
